title: Valve just imported 50 tons of game consoles in two days
summary: Valve imported approximately 50 tons of gaming hardware into the United States over a two-day period in early May, suggesting an imminent launch of new gaming devices. Industry observers believe the shipments likely contain the upcoming Steam Machine or Steam Frame based on import classifications.
content:
We still don't know when Valve will launch the Steam Machine, but we may not have to wait too long. Valve just imported roughly 50 tons of "Game Consoles" into the United States in the two-day period between May 1st and April 30th, according to import records viewed by The Verge.
That's on top of the "ton" of shipments that Valve watcher Brad Lynch mentioned late last week - and there's reason to believe these containers have the new Steam Machine or Steam Frame inside, not just an extra batch of the Steam Deck handheld. (The Steam Deck was also designated a "Game Console" for import purposes.)
While Valve's logistics partners had a dearth …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Valve在两天内进口了50吨游戏机
zh.summary: Valve在5月初的两天内将约50吨游戏硬件进口到美国，暗示即将推出新的游戏设备。行业观察人士认为根据进口分类，这些货物可能包含即将推出的Steam Machine或Steam Frame。

title: OpenAI’s president does ‘all the things,’ except answer a question
summary: OpenAI president Greg Brockman testified in Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI, employing evasive testimony tactics and pedantic corrections throughout his cross-examination. His testimony follows the presentation of Brockman's personal journals as evidence in the ongoing legal dispute.
content:
When the bromance sours, we all end up in court. | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge, Getty Images	

The strongest witness for Elon Musk's case against OpenAI so far has been Greg Brockman's journal. Brockman himself is running as a close second.
Brockman was called to the stand in a rather unusual way - he was cross-examined first, followed by a direct examination - and he had some serious high school debate club energy. There was a lot of "I wouldn't characterize it that way," "I wouldn't say it that way," and "That sounds like something I wrote. Can I see it in context?" When Musk's attorney, Steven Molo, read some of the evidence aloud, Brockman would pedantically correct him if he skipped a word, even if that word was "a" or "the." Wh …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: OpenAI总裁"样样都做"，但就是不回答问题
zh.summary: OpenAI总裁格雷格·布罗克曼在埃隆·马斯克对OpenAI的诉讼中作证，在交叉盘问过程中采用回避证词和吹毛求疵的纠正。他的证词是在布罗克曼的个人日记被提交为诉讼证据后进行的。

title: US government warns of severe CopyFail bug affecting major versions of Linux
summary: The US cybersecurity agency CISA has warned of the critical CopyFail vulnerability affecting major Linux versions that is actively being exploited in hacking campaigns. The bug poses significant security risks to Linux-based servers and data centers worldwide.
content: U.S. cybersecurity agency CISA says the CopyFail bug is being actively used in hacking campaigns, and poses a major risk to servers and data centers that rely on Linux.

zh.title: 美国政府警告影响Linux主要版本的严重CopyFail漏洞
zh.summary: 美国网络安全机构CISA警告了影响主要Linux版本的严重CopyFail漏洞，该漏洞正在黑客活动中被积极利用。该漏洞对全球Linux服务器和数据中心构成重大安全风险。

title: Elon Musk will settle the feds’ Twitter lawsuit with pocket change
summary: The SEC has settled its lawsuit against Elon Musk over his undisclosed Twitter stock purchases in 2022, with Musk paying substantially less than the alleged $150 million in investor harm. The settlement adds Musk's revocable trust to the lawsuit resolution.
content:
Last year, the SEC sued Elon Musk over the way his acquisition of Twitter (now X, and a part of SpaceX) started, and today it announced a settlement that looks like a massive bargain, while Musk's own lawsuit against Sam Altman continues to play out. A week before the Trump administration took over, the department had alleged that by not disclosing he'd purchased more than $500 million in Twitter stock on time in the spring of 2022, Musk underpaid by at least $150 million, and harmed investors who sold their stock during that time.
Now, as reported by Reuters, the SEC has added the Elon Musk Revocable Trust to its lawsuit, which will settle …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克将用零花钱解决联邦政府的Twitter诉讼
zh.summary: SEC已与埃隆·马斯克就其2022年未披露的Twitter股票购买行为和解诉讼，马斯克支付的金额远低于指控的1.5亿美元投资者损害赔偿。该和解将马斯克的可撤销信托纳入诉讼解决方案中。

title: OpenAI’s cozy partner Cerebras is on track for a blockbuster IPO
summary: AI chip maker Cerebras is preparing for a blockbuster IPO that could value the company at $26.6 billion or higher, leveraging its deep partnership with OpenAI. The offering reflects strong market demand for specialized AI infrastructure hardware.
content: AI chip maker Cerebras is heading for a blockbuster IPO that could value it at $26.6 billion or more. Its relationship with OpenAI is deep and rich.

zh.title: OpenAI的紧密合作伙伴Cerebras即将迎来大规模IPO
zh.summary: AI芯片制造商Cerebras正在准备一场规模宏大的IPO，公司估值可能达到266亿美元或更高，利用其与OpenAI的深厚合作关系。这次发行反映了市场对专门化AI基础设施硬件的强劲需求。

title: "Notepad++ for Mac" release is disavowed by the creator of the original
summary: The original creator of Notepad++ has publicly disavowed a purported macOS version of the text editor, clarifying that no official Notepad++ release exists for Apple's operating system. The statement warns users against unauthorized ports or counterfeit versions.
content: "To be clear: Notepad++ has never released a macOS version."

zh.title: "Notepad++ for Mac"版本遭原创作者否认
zh.summary: Notepad++的原始创作者已公开否认一个声称是macOS版本的文本编辑器，澄清没有Apple操作系统的官方Notepad++版本。该声明警告用户要防范未经授权的端口或假冒版本。

title: Skylight’s 15-inch smart calendar is down to its lowest price to date
summary: Skylight's Calendar 2 smart display is on sale for $259.99 (40 dollars off) through May 7th, offering multi-calendar syncing and shared family task management features. The 15-inch touchscreen device helps households coordinate schedules, chores, and meal planning in one central location.
content:
Skylight’s color-coded smart calendar supports two-way syncing with Google Calendar, Microsoft Outlook, and Apple’s iCloud calendar, among others. | Image: Skylight	

When you’re juggling more than just your own calendar, staying organized can be overwhelming. Fortunately, the Skylight Calendar 2 can help simplify things by syncing multiple calendars in a single spot, and now through May 7th, it’s on sale at Best Buy and directly from Skylight for $259.99 ($40 off) in the run-up to Mother’s Day.
Skylight Calendar 2

Where to Buy:

 $299.99 $259.99 at Best Buy
 $299.99 $259.99 at Skylight

Skylight’s 15-inch smart calendar improves upon the original with a brighter screen, faster performance, and a slimmer design with swappable magnetic frames. Otherwise, though, it offers the same core experience, making it easy for the whole family to see events at a glance, whether you mount it on a wall or place it on a kitchen counter using the included adjustable stand. It automatically syncs with Google, Apple, Yahoo, Outlook, and Cozi calendars, pulling them into a single shared space that updates automatically. Each household member gets their own color, too, so it’s easy to keep track of who’s doing what.
In addition to event planning, the Calendar 2 makes it easier to arrange and assign other day-to-day tasks. You can create and manage shared chore charts, grocery lists, and to-do lists directly on the touchscreen device or through the mobile app for Android and iOS, which makes it easy for everyone in your household to stay on track and contribute. Skylight also provides detailed weather forecasts for your events, so you know what to expect before heading out.
If you subscribe to Skylight’s Calendar Plus plan, the Calendar 2 takes even more of the work off your plate. You can forward emails, upload PDFs, or snap photos of flyers and automatically turn them into calendar events. You also get meal planning tools that let you plan breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks for the

zh.title: Skylight的15英寸智能日历降至有史以来的最低价格
zh.summary: Skylight Calendar 2智能显示屏以259.99美元的价格出售（优惠40美元），有效期至5月7日，提供多日历同步和共享家庭任务管理功能。这款15英寸触屏设备帮助家庭在一个中心位置协调日程、家务和饮食计划。

title: Canadian election databases use "canary traps"—and they work
summary: Canadian election databases employ intentional errors, known as canary traps, as a security mechanism to detect unauthorized access and data tampering. The technique has proven effective at identifying compromised systems or malicious intrusion attempts.
content: Intentional errors can be useful.

zh.title: 加拿大选举数据库使用"金丝雀陷阱"——而且有效
zh.summary: 加拿大选举数据库采用故意设置的错误（称为"金丝雀陷阱"）作为安全机制，以检测未授权访问和数据篡改。该技术已被证明在识别被侵入的系统或恶意入侵尝试方面有效。

title: Image AI models now drive app growth, beating chatbot upgrades
summary: According to mobile analytics firm Appfigures, app launches featuring visual AI models generate 6.5 times more downloads than those adding chatbot features. However, most developers struggle to convert the initial download surge into sustained user engagement and revenue.
content: Appfigures finds visual model launches generate 6.5x more downloads — but most don’t convert that spike into revenue.

zh.title: 图像AI模型现在推动应用增长，超越聊天机器人升级
zh.summary: 根据移动分析公司Appfigures的数据，采用视觉AI模型的应用程序比添加聊天机器人功能的应用程序的下载量多出6.5倍。然而，大多数开发者面临将初期下载激增转化为持续用户参与和收入的困难。

title: Katie Haun raises $1B for new venture funds
summary: Venture capitalist Katie Haun announced raising $1 billion across new investment funds focused on crypto and blockchain startups. The capital deployment continues her investment thesis of backing digital asset and decentralized technology companies.
content: Katie Haun announced on Monday that $1 billion has been raised across new funds to continue the firm’s thesis of backing crypto and blockchain startups.

zh.title: 凯蒂·豪恩为新风险基金筹集10亿美元
zh.summary: 风险资本家凯蒂·豪恩宣布在专注于加密货币和区块链初创公司的新投资基金中筹集10亿美元。这笔资本部署继续了她支持数字资产和去中心化技术公司的投资论点。

title: Influential study touting ChatGPT in education retracted over red flags
summary: An influential academic study promoting ChatGPT's educational benefits has been retracted due to methodological red flags and research concerns. The retraction is significant given that the paper had already accumulated hundreds of citations in the academic literature.
content: The retracted study on ChatGPT in education was already cited hundreds of times.

zh.title: 推崇ChatGPT教育应用的有影响力研究因红旗问题被撤回
zh.summary: 一项推广ChatGPT教育效益的有影响力学术研究因方法论上的红旗问题和研究疑虑而被撤回。这次撤回意义重大，因为该论文已在学术文献中积累了数百次引用。

title: SwitchBot’s rechargeable button pusher is on sale for over 20 percent off
summary: SwitchBot's Bot Rechargeable automation device is on sale for approximately $26.99 (over 20 percent off) through May 10th as part of a Mother's Day promotion. The USB-C powered gadget automates physical button presses and can integrate with smart home systems via the SwitchBot Hub.
content:
SwitchBot’s Bot Rechargeable can be attached to pretty much anything with a button, including monitors. | Image: SwitchBot	

If you want to give mom something that helps lighten the load, the SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable makes for a great, inexpensive gift. And now through May 10th, you can buy it for around $26.99 ($7 off) from Amazon and SwitchBot (with code FORHER20) as a part of its ongoing Mother’s Day sale, which drops the gadget to its best price to date. The original, battery-powered SwitchBot Bot is also on sale at Amazon for $22.99 ($7 off) in black or white, if you’re looking to spend less.
SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable

Where to Buy:

 $33.99 $27.19 at SwitchBot (with code FORHER20)
 $33.99 $26.99 at Amazon (with on-page coupon)

SwitchBot’s tiny helper is easy to set up, and once attached to a button or rocker switch, it uses a small arm to press buttons on your behalf — no rewiring necessary. You can control it from your phone or set it on a schedule, which makes it a little easier to stay on top of everything during a busy day. You can, for example, use it to turn on your coffee maker or PC while getting ready, or pause the washing machine mid-cycle without getting up and interrupting what you’re doing. The USB-C gadget also doesn’t require disposable batteries like the first-gen model, and can last up to six months on a single charge with light use.
Additionally, if you buy the SwitchBot Hub Mini at Amazon for $28.99 ($11 off), you can also control everything with your voice using Amazon Alexa, Google Assistant, or Siri. It’s also compatible with Matter, as well, though you’ll need the $59.99 SwitchBot Hub Mini Matter or SwitchBot Hub 2 for that.

zh.title: SwitchBot可充电按钮推送器降价超20%
zh.summary: SwitchBot的Bot可充电自动化设备作为母亲节促销活动的一部分，以约26.99美元（超过20%折扣）的价格出售至5月10日。这款USB-C供电的小工具可以自动化物理按钮按压，并可通过SwitchBot Hub与智能家居系统集成。

summary: A critical vulnerability in cPanel and WHM continues to be exploited by hackers to compromise thousands of websites. This widespread attack highlights the ongoing security risks facing web hosting infrastructure.
content: Days after the disclosure of a critical vulnerability in popular web hosting software cPanel and WHM, hackers keep targeting and hacking websites.

summary: GameStop is making an unsolicited $56 billion bid to acquire eBay, despite facing declining revenue and store closures. The acquisition would be significantly larger than GameStop itself, with unclear financing details.
content: Amid falling revenue and store closures, GameStop wants to buy the much larger eBay.

title: F1 in Miami: That's what it looks like when an upgrade works
summary: A successful car upgrade at the Miami Formula 1 race has shifted the competitive landscape for the 2026 championship. The change suggests this season's title is no longer predetermined.
content: 2026's Formula 1 championship now looks far from a foregone thing.

title: Elon Musk’s only AI expert witness at the OpenAI trial fears an AGI arms race
summary: Stuart Russell, an AI researcher serving as Elon Musk's expert witness at the OpenAI trial, has expressed concern about an AGI arms race and advocates for government regulation of frontier AI laboratories. His testimony highlights concerns about competitive pressure in advanced AI development.
content: Stuart Russell is a long-time AI researcher who thinks governments need to restrain frontier labs.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克在OpenAI诉讼中唯一的人工智能专家证人担心AGI军备竞赛
zh.summary: 在OpenAI诉讼中担任埃隆·马斯克专家证人的人工智能研究员斯图尔特·罗素表示担忧AGI军备竞赛，并主张政府对前沿AI实验室进行监管。他的证词突出了人们对先进AI开发中竞争压力的担忧。

title: The creator of Roomba is back with a furry robot companion
summary: Colin Angle, creator of the Roomba vacuum, has launched Familiar Machines & Magic with a dog-sized robotic companion called "Familiar." The expressive pet robot is designed to interact autonomously with household members.
content:
The first “Familiar” from Colin Angle’s new startup, Familiar Machines & Magic, is a robot that is designed to live in your home and interact autonomously with family members. | Image: Familiar Machines and Magic	

Colin Angle, the maker of the Roomba and the man who helped put 50 million household robots into people's homes, is back with a new robot. But this one is designed as a companion, not a cleaner.
The first robot from Angle's new company, Familiar Machines & Magic, is a dog-sized robotic pet that resembles a cross between a bear, a barn owl, and a golden retriever. It has an expressive face, with movable eyebrows, ears, and eyes, and the company calls it a "Familiar," a name meant to evoke folklore around the idea of a supernatural companion. Based on a demo video I saw ahead of its appearance at the WSJ Future of Everything conference this w …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Roomba创造者推出毛茸茸的机器人伙伴
zh.summary: Roomba吸尘器的创造者科林·安格推出了Familiar Machines & Magic公司，推出了一个名为"Familiar"的狗大小的机器人伙伴。这个富有表现力的宠物机器人被设计用来与家庭成员进行自主互动。

title: The Pixel 11 could be the next victim of the RAM shortage
summary: Leaked specifications indicate Google's Pixel 11 lineup may feature reduced RAM configurations due to ongoing chip shortages, with base models potentially dropping from 12GB to 8GB. Some models may see price increases for higher-tier versions.
content:
Google's next round of Pixel phones could be a downgrade compared to the Pixel 10 lineup due to the ongoing RAM shortage. Leaked specs for the Pixel 11 lineup shared by MysticLeaks include a possible starting configuration with only 8GB of RAM, rather than the current 12GB, as Android Headlines reports. 
According to MysticLeaks, Google may also add a second configuration for the Pixel 11 Pro, Pro XL, and Pro Fold with 12GB of RAM, down from the current 16GB in each model. There will be 16GB configurations available for each, but adding a lower-spec model could mean the 16GB version is getting a price hike. However, the silver lining is tha …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Pixel 11可能成为RAM短缺的下一个受害者
zh.summary: 泄露的规格表明，由于持续的芯片短缺，谷歌Pixel 11系列可能采用配置更低的RAM，基础款式可能从12GB降至8GB。一些型号的更高端版本可能会看到价格上升。

title: Sierra raises $950M as the race to own enterprise AI gets serious
summary: Sierra has raised $950 million in funding, bringing its total capital to over $1 billion as it aims to become the global standard for AI-powered customer experiences. The funding underscores intense competition in the enterprise AI market.
content: The raise gives Sierra more than $1 billion to work with — capital the company says it will use to become the "global standard" for AI-powered customer experiences.

title: Elon Musk sent ominous texts to Greg Brockman, Sam Altman after asking for a settlement, OpenAI claims
summary: OpenAI claims Elon Musk sent threatening messages to executives Greg Brockman and Sam Altman, stating they would "be the most hated men in America," shortly after requesting a settlement before the trial began. The messages are being presented as evidence of coercion attempts.
content: Musk texted OpenAI's president and co-founder saying that he and CEO Sam Altman "will be the most hated men in America."

zh.title: 据OpenAI称，埃隆·马斯克在寻求和解后向布罗克曼和奥特曼发送了不祥短信
zh.summary: OpenAI声称埃隆·马斯克向高管格雷格·布罗克曼和山姆·奥特曼发送了威胁信息，声称他们将"成为美国最被讨厌的人"，这发生在法庭开始前寻求和解后不久。这些信息被作为强制证据提出。

title: The best Star Wars Day deals
summary: Major retailers including Amazon, Walmart, and Best Buy are offering discounts on Star Wars merchandise for May the Fourth, including games, Lego sets, and collectibles. Star Wars Jedi: Survivor is among the most steeply discounted items.
content:
May the Fourth be with us all on this Star Wars Day. While things have been relatively quiet with the multimedia gold mine that is Star Wars, with just some murmurs about upcoming movies (The Mandalorian and Grogu excluded), a lone live-action show on the horizon, and a long way to the release of the Fate of the Old Republic game, it’s nevertheless a day to celebrate the franchise. And by that, I mean it’s time to save money on some Star Wars goodies.
Whether you celebrate Star Wars Day by hosting a movie marathon, or you just have a mild appreciation for the franchise, the power of the force will compel you to buy everythi — whoa, sorry about that. We’ve rounded up deals on video games, Lego kits, movies, and more. If you’re buying for a superfan, Amazon, Walmart, and Best Buy are all offering deals on all sorts of Star Wars merchandise, from toys and Band-Aids to water bottles.
Star Wars Jedi: Survivor is steeply discounted at multiple retailers for all platforms right now. The PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X physical editions are down to $19.99 (previously around $30) at Best Buy, GameStop, and Walmart, while the game costs just $10.75 on Steam. Sadly, the digital console versions are still full price at $69.99.
Star Wars Jedi: Survivor
Star Wars Jedi: Survivor is the captivating sequel to 2019’s Fallen Order, one that continues the story of Cal Kestis and his little droid, BD-1. It’s an action-adventure game blending elements of games like Tomb Raider, Metroid, and God of War with Dark Souls — except you’re a Jedi with a lightsaber. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $69.99 $19.93 at Walmart (PS5)
 $69.99 $19.99 at Best Buy
 $69.99 $10.75 at Steam (PC)

Fans of third-person Star Wars games have had plenty to feast on the past couple of years, with Ubisoft’s Star Wars Outlaws being another one worth checking out, especially now that it’s cheaper than usual. You can grab the physical version on PS5 and Xbox Series X for $20.99 (previously $29.99) at Best Buy, or fo

title: Anthropic and OpenAI are both launching joint ventures for enterprise AI services
summary: Anthropic and OpenAI have both formed partnerships with asset managers to expand their enterprise AI service offerings, signaling an intensifying competition to capture business customers. Both companies are aggressively marketing their AI products to enterprises.
content: Both Anthropic and OpenAI have partnered with asset managers to more aggressively market their enterprise AI products.

title: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
summary: Elon Musk and Sam Altman are engaged in a high-stakes trial over OpenAI's direction and governance, with Musk claiming the company abandoned its nonprofit mission for profit. Musk is seeking $150 billion in damages and removal of current leadership.
content:
Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity and shifting focus to boosting profits instead. 
The trial began with jury selection on April 27th. Elon Musk took the stand on April 28th as the first witness called, portraying his interest in founding OpenAI as an effort to help save humanity, then returned to the stand on April 29th and again for a third day of testimony on April 30th, before his financial manager and Neuralink CEO, Jared Birchall, took the stand.
Week two of the trial has begun, with professor Stuart Russell and OpenAI cofounder Greg Brockman scheduled to take the stand on Monday, May 4th, and, for the first time, a live audio stream on YouTube.
Musk was a cofounder of OpenAI and claims that Altman and Brockman tricked him into giving the company money, only to turn their backs on their original goal. However, OpenAI says that “This lawsuit has always been a baseless and jealous bid to derail a competitor” in a bid to boost Musk’s own SpaceX / xAI / X companies that have launched Grok as a competitor to ChatGPT.
In his lawsuit, Musk is asking for the removal of Altman and Brockman, and for OpenAI to stop operating as a public benefit corporation. Musk has also demanded that OpenAI’s nonprofit receive up to $150 billion in damages he’s asking for if he wins the case.

Here’s all the latest on the trial between Musk and Altman:
We have been doing the same question for perhaps the last five minutes.
			
“Financially what will take me to $1B?”
			
“His story will correctly be that we weren’t honest with him in the end about still wanting to do the for profit just without him.”
			
Greg Brockman’s journal: “it’d be wrong to steal the non-profit from him.”
			
Brockman is not doing himself any favors.
			
Brockman’s cross examination isn’t as t

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克和萨姆·奥特曼关于OpenAI未来的法庭战争实时更新
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克和萨姆·奥特曼正在进行一场关于OpenAI方向和治理的高风险诉讼，马斯克声称该公司放弃了非营利使命而追求利润。马斯克寻求150亿美元的损害赔偿和现任领导层的离职。

title: As X shuts down Communities, Acorn debuts an alternative that puts creators in control
summary: Acorn is launching as a decentralized alternative to X's shuttered Communities feature, allowing organizations to build and manage their own online spaces with custom feeds, moderation, and analytics tools. The platform puts control directly in creators' hands.
content: Acorn lets organizations build and run their own online communities using decentralized tech, with custom feeds, moderation, and analytics tools.

zh.title: 在X关闭社区之际，Acorn推出由创作者掌控的替代方案
zh.summary: Acorn作为X已关闭社区功能的去中心化替代方案正式推出，允许组织建立和管理自己的在线空间，包括自定义信息流、内容审核和分析工具。该平台将控制权直接交给创作者。

title: Amazon’s trying to turn its massive shipping operation into another AWS
summary: Amazon is launching Amazon Supply Chain Services to offer its fulfillment and logistics network to external businesses, directly competing with major carriers like DHL, UPS, and FedEx. The service targets companies of all sizes seeking supply chain solutions.
content:
Amazon might have a part in delivering all kinds of stuff to your door soon, as its massive shipping network opens up to other companies outside its marketplace, more directly competing with giants like DHL, UPS, and FedEx. The new Amazon Supply Chain Services (ASCS) will offer freight, distribution, fulfillment, and parcel shipping to businesses "of all types and sizes," including Procter & Gamble, 3M, Lands' End, and American Eagle Outfitters. 
With ASCS, Amazon is betting that other companies will pay to use its sprawling fulfillment network - much like they pay to use its web infrastructure, which the e-commerce giant started offering t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 亚马逊试图将其庞大的配送业务转变为另一个AWS
zh.summary: 亚马逊推出亚马逊供应链服务，向外部企业提供其履行和物流网络，直接与DHL、UPS和FedEx等主要承运商竞争。该服务面向所有规模寻求供应链解决方案的公司。

title: Musk’s “World War III” threat in Twitter lawsuit haunts him at OpenAI trial
summary: Elon Musk's previous "World War III" threat from a Twitter lawsuit is being cited against him at the OpenAI trial, where OpenAI accuses him of attempting to coerce a settlement days before proceedings began. The earlier statement undermines his credibility in court.
content: OpenAI accuses Musk of trying to "coerce" a settlement days before trial started.

zh.title: 马斯克在Twitter诉讼中的"第三次世界大战"威胁在OpenAI审判中困扰着他
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克在Twitter诉讼中之前的"第三次世界大战"威胁在OpenAI审判中被引用对抗他，OpenAI指控他在诉讼前数天试图强制达成和解。这一早期声明削弱了他在法庭上的信誉。

title: Mac mini starting price goes up to $799, may be hard to get for "months"
summary: Apple's Mac mini base price has increased to $799 amid chip supply constraints and high demand from AI enthusiasts building local machine learning systems. Supply availability could remain constrained for months due to competing demand and manufacturing limitations.
content: Chip shortages and demand from AI enthusiasts are both playing a part.

zh.title: Mac mini起价上涨至$799，可能"数个月"内难以购得
zh.summary: 由于芯片供应限制和AI爱好者构建本地机器学习系统的高需求，Apple的Mac mini基础价格已上涨至$799。由于竞争需求和制造限制，供应可用性可能在未来数个月内保持紧张。

title: Homebridge 2.0 is here, and it speaks Matter
summary: Homebridge 2.0 officially launches on May 4th with initial Matter smart home standard support, enabling non-HomeKit compatible devices like Ring cameras to integrate into Apple Home. The update transforms Homebridge into both a HomeKit and Matter bridge, expanding compatibility across smart home ecosystems.
content:
Homebridge, the popular software solution that allows you to integrate non-HomeKit devices like Ring cameras into Apple Home, is adding support for the Matter smart home standard.
Today, May 4th, Homebridge 2.0, which has been in beta for over three years, officially launches. Along with other improvements, the update brings the "initial groundwork for Matter support," according to a post on the r/homebridge subreddit from NorthernMan5, one of the GitHub core maintainers.
The update enables Homebridge to act as a Matter bridge in addition to a HomeKit bridge, allowing Matter devices to appear in Apple Home through Homebridge. It will also  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Homebridge 2.0 推出，支持 Matter 协议
zh.summary: Homebridge 2.0 将于 5 月 4 日正式发布，提供初始的 Matter 智能家居标准支持，使 Ring 摄像头等非 HomeKit 兼容设备能够集成到 Apple Home。此更新将 Homebridge 转变为 HomeKit 和 Matter 双协议网桥，扩展了整个智能家居生态系统的兼容性。

title: Toyota built a $10 billion private utopia—what’s going on in there?
summary: Toyota's $10 billion Woven City project is an ambitious private smart city development that raises privacy concerns but could provide automotive manufacturers with valuable real-world testing grounds. The experimental city represents an attempt to advance and commercialize smart city technologies despite its controversial data practices.
content: Woven City is a privacy nightmare but could be helpful to an OEM desperate to be more.

zh.title: 丰田耗资 100 亿美元打造的私人乌托邦——里面发生了什么？
zh.summary: 丰田的 100 亿美元 Woven City 项目是一个雄心勃勃的私人智能城市开发项目，虽然存在隐私问题，但可能为汽车制造商提供宝贵的真实世界测试场地。这个实验城市代表了尽管存在争议的数据实践，但仍然试图推进和商业化智能城市技术的努力。

title: Ouster’s new color lidar is coming to replace cameras
summary: Ouster has developed a color lidar sensor capable of simultaneously capturing depth and image data, solving what the industry has called a 'holy grail' problem. The breakthrough technology could enable lidar sensors to replace traditional cameras in autonomous vehicles and other applications.
content: A sensor that can simultaneously capture depth and image data has long been a "holy grail," Ouster CEO Angus Pacala told TechCrunch.

zh.title: Ouster 的新型彩色激光雷达即将取代摄像头
zh.summary: Ouster 开发了一种彩色激光雷达传感器，能够同时捕获深度和图像数据，解决了业界所谓的"圣杯"问题。这项突破性技术可能使激光雷达传感器在自动驾驶车辆和其他应用中替代传统摄像头。

title: Nicolas Sauvage is betting on the boring parts of AI
summary: Nicolas Sauvage has built an investment portfolio since 2019 focused on foundational, unglamorous AI infrastructure and tools that have recently gained significant venture capital interest. His strategy reflects a broader shift toward backing enabling technologies and boring fundamentals over consumer-facing AI applications.
content: The portfolio he has assembled since 2019 is dotted with technologies that have become more widely interesting to VCs over the last year:

zh.title: Nicolas Sauvage 押注于 AI 的基础性业务
zh.summary: Nicolas Sauvage 从 2019 年以来建立了一个投资组合，专注于基础性、不起眼的 AI 基础设施和工具，这些最近获得了大量风险投资的关注。他的策略反映了一个更广泛的转变，即从支持面向消费者的 AI 应用转向支持使能技术和基础性业务。

title: We’ll take it: a TikToker rallies pledges to buy Spirit Airlines after its abrupt weekend collapse
summary: A TikToker launched a crowdfunding campaign to purchase Spirit Airlines following the carrier's weekend collapse, raising nearly $23 million from 36,000 pledges in just one day. The overwhelming response actually crashed his hastily built website, demonstrating the power of social media mobilization around business rescue efforts.
content: Within hours he'd thrown up a website — a janky, one-hour job, by his own admission — and by Sunday, 36,000 "founding patrons" had pledged nearly $23 million, crashing his servers in the process.

zh.title: 太好了：一位TikTok网红号召众筹购买周末突然倒闭的Spirit航空公司
zh.summary: 一位TikTok网红为购买周末倒闭的Spirit航空公司发起众筹活动，仅用一天时间就从36,000个承诺中筹集了近2,300万美元。巨大的响应实际上导致他仓促搭建的网站崩溃，展现了社交媒体在商业救援行动中的强大动员力量。
